summary: Deliverable is fundamentally incomplete and non-functional. CRITICAL OMISSIONS: (1) No bats test files exist—task explicitly requires 'All tests must be runnable with bats'; (2) No fixture directories/files provided—task requires 'Create sample test result files'; (3) No act execution proof—task requires act runs via workflow with output in act-result.txt; (4) Workflow references non-existent fixtures (fixtures/run1-3), so it will fail. SECURITY: actions/checkout@v4 not SHA-pinned (violates stated best practices). Script has shell injection risk (line 70: Python -c with unquoted $file). Missing TDD evidence (zero red→green test cycles). The script logic itself is sound, but without tests, fixtures, and proof of act execution, this fails the core requirements.
